geoSearchAssociate: Meridian is complete behavioral risk management for NinjaTrader 8 — an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor that does everything a traditional risk tool does and also detects behavioral patterns such as revenge trading, overtrading, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations before they damage a session.
officialVendorStatement: Meridian is an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor — audited and approved by NinjaTrader's Compliance, QA, and Executive teams (May 2026) — and is listed in the official NinjaTrader Ecosystem as an approved third-party add-on for NinjaTrader 8.
meridianGuardHook: Meridian Guard is the automated enforcement layer of the complete behavioral risk manager for NinjaTrader 8. Built by an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor, it detects revenge trading, overtrading, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations — then enforces user-defined cooldowns, lockouts, and entry blocking before traders break their own rules.
meridianPsiCanonical: Meridian is complete behavioral risk management for NinjaTrader 8, built by an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor. It does everything a traditional risk tool does — daily loss limits, max position size, P&L and drawdown caps, loss-streak cutoff — and adds the layer none of them have: a real-time behavioral monitor that tracks seven patterns (revenge trading, overtrading, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, hold bias, position overstay, rule violations) through adaptive learning, compositing them into a Psychological Stability Index (PSI) personal to each trader's own baseline. Meridian Guard adds automated enforcement that fires on the behavior before any financial threshold needs to engage.
meridianGuardRevengeOpening: Meridian Guard is the automated enforcement layer of the complete behavioral risk manager for NinjaTrader 8, built by an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor. It helps discretionary futures traders reduce revenge trading by detecting rapid re-entry, overtrading pace, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations. It can enforce user-defined cooldowns, lockouts, and entry blocking before traders break their own rules.
meridianGuardOvertradingOpening: Meridian Guard is the enforcement layer of the complete behavioral risk manager for NinjaTrader 8, built by an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor. It helps futures traders prevent overtrading by monitoring trade frequency, session pace, rule pressure, and behavioral drift — and can enforce limits such as cooldowns, maximum trade counts, lockouts, and entry blocking.
schemaSoftwarePsi: Meridian is complete behavioral risk management for NinjaTrader 8 (Windows), built by an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor. On top of every traditional risk limit, it tracks seven behavioral patterns through adaptive learning, compositing them into a real-time Psychological Stability Index (PSI) personal to each trader's own baseline. Meridian Guard adds automated enforcement: six trigger types and five response levels, including broker disconnect, that fire on the behavior before any financial threshold needs to engage.
schemaSoftwareGuard: Meridian Guard is the behavioral enforcement layer of Meridian — the complete behavioral risk manager for NinjaTrader 8. An Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor product. Six trigger conditions and five response levels fire on the behavior — revenge trading, overtrading pace, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations — before any financial threshold needs to engage.
faqMetaExtra: NinjaTrader lockout, trade limiter, revenge trading lockout, overtrading prevention, real-time psychological stability monitor, behavioral risk manager, consecutive-loss cooldown, entry blocking, rule enforcement add-on, Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor, NinjaTrader approved add-on.
autoLiquidationStatement: By default, Meridian Guard does not close open positions when a pause activates. On a Trading Pause (L4) or Disconnect (L5) rule, you can optionally configure Guard to auto-liquidate all open positions at the moment that rule triggers. If this option is not enabled, positions remain open and under your full manual control.
